title: dortmanna lacustris
intro: Dortmanna lacustris, also known as water dock or water avens, is a type of flowering plant that grows in wet environments, typically found near streams, rivers, and lakes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Dortmanna lacustris include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
